metadata.name: svs_11
metadata.description: SVS-11: Solana Vault Standard - Credit Markets Vault with KYC attestation and oracle-only NAV pricing

instructions.name: approve_deposit
docs: Manager approves a pending deposit request.

instructions.name: approve_redeem
docs: Manager approves a pending redemption request.

instructions.name: cancel_deposit
docs: Investor cancels their pending deposit request.

instructions.name: cancel_redeem
docs: Investor cancels their pending redemption request.

instructions.name: claim_deposit
docs: Claim approved deposit shares.

instructions.name: claim_redeem
docs: Claim approved redemption assets.

instructions.name: close_investment_window
docs: Close the investment window, blocking new requests.

instructions.name: draw_down
docs: Manager draws down capital from the vault.

accounts.name: destination
docs: Any asset-mint account -- credit vault capital is deployed off-chain.

instructions.name: freeze_account
docs: Freeze an investor account for compliance.

instructions.name: initialize_pool
docs: Initialize a new credit vault pool.

instructions.name: open_investment_window
docs: Open the investment window for deposit and redeem requests.

instructions.name: pause
docs: Pause the vault, halting approvals and capital movements.

instructions.name: reject_deposit
docs: Manager rejects a pending deposit request.

instructions.name: repay
docs: Manager repays borrowed capital to the vault.

instructions.name: request_deposit
docs: Request a deposit into the vault.

instructions.name: request_redeem
docs: Request a redemption of vault shares.

instructions.name: set_manager
docs: Set a new vault manager.

instructions.name: transfer_authority
docs: Transfer vault authority to a new address.

instructions.name: unfreeze_account
docs: Unfreeze a previously frozen investor account.

instructions.name: unpause
docs: Unpause the vault.

instructions.name: update_attester
docs: Update the attestation configuration (attester and attestation program).

instructions.name: update_oracle_config
docs: Update the NAV oracle configuration.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: RequestNotPending
errors.msg: Request is not in pending status

errors.name: RequestNotApproved
errors.msg: Request is not in approved status

errors.name: InvalidAddress
errors.msg: Invalid address: cannot be the zero address

errors.name: InvalidAttestationProgram
errors.msg: Attestation account not owned by attestation program

errors.name: InvalidAttester
errors.msg: Attestation issuer does not match vault attester

errors.name: OracleInvalidProgram
errors.msg: Oracle account owner does not match vault.oracle_program

errors.name: GlobalCapExceeded
errors.msg: Deposit would exceed global vault cap
